gameContext.scope: Curated starter templates for all 40 live specializations. Defaults are starting points; talent choices, haste, cooldown reduction, encounter context, and combat-log aura IDs can require adjustment.

presets.name: Avoid capping Runic Power
presets.description: Flags periods at 90+ Runic Power when a Death Strike could usually be banked or spent.

presets.name: Use Dancing Rune Weapon
presets.description: Highlights time Dancing Rune Weapon is ready while actively fighting.

presets.name: Use Vampiric Blood
presets.description: Highlights time Vampiric Blood is ready during combat.

presets.name: Maintain Bone Shield
presets.description: Flags combat time without Bone Shield. Review pull transitions separately.

presets.name: Use Pillar of Frost
presets.description: Highlights unused Pillar of Frost windows.

presets.name: Use Empower Rune Weapon
presets.description: Highlights unused Empower Rune Weapon windows.

presets.name: Avoid capping Fury
presets.description: Flags periods at 90+ Fury before Chaos Strike, Blade Dance, or other spenders.

presets.name: Avoid capped Reap charges
presets.description: Highlights capped Reap charges when Second Helping grants a second charge.
reviewReasons: Second Helping adds a charge and Umbral Blade can make the cooldown hasted.

presets.name: Use Soul Immolation
presets.description: Highlights unused Soul Immolation windows for resource generation and self-healing.

presets.name: Avoid capped Demon Spikes charges
reviewReasons: The displayed base spell has one charge; verify the Vengeance passive/talent-adjusted maximum used by the analyzer.

presets.name: Avoid capping Astral Power
presets.description: Flags periods at 90+ Astral Power before Starsurge or Starfall spending.

presets.name: Use Force of Nature
presets.description: Highlights unused Force of Nature windows.

presets.name: Spend capped Combo Points
presets.description: Flags periods at 5+ Combo Points before a finisher. Raise the threshold for builds with a higher cap.

presets.name: Avoid capping Rage
presets.description: Flags periods at 90+ Rage before Ironfur, Maul, or other spending.

presets.name: Avoid capped Survival Instincts charges
reviewReasons: Charge count and recharge behavior are talent-sensitive.

presets.name: Maintain Ironfur during physical tanking
presets.description: Flags combat time without Ironfur. Evaluate only during dangerous physical tanking windows.

presets.name: Watch low Mana
presets.description: Flags time at 20% Mana or lower. This is a risk indicator, not automatically a mistake.

presets.name: Use Innervate
presets.description: Highlights time Innervate remains unused during combat.

presets.name: Maintain Lifebloom
presets.description: Flags time with no Lifebloom active on allies. Context-sensitive during downtime.

presets.name: Avoid capping Essence
presets.description: Flags periods at 5 Essence before spending.

presets.name: Use Breath of Eons
presets.description: Highlights unused Breath of Eons windows.

presets.name: Maintain Ebon Might
presets.description: Flags periods where allies lack Ebon Might while you are actively fighting.

presets.name: Use Call of the Wild
presets.description: Highlights unused Call of the Wild windows.

presets.name: Avoid capped Wildfire Bomb charges
reviewReasons: The displayed base spell has one charge; verify the Survival build-adjusted maximum used by the analyzer.

presets.name: Watch low Mana
presets.description: Flags periods at 30% Mana or lower. Use this to inspect whether burn and recovery cycles are deliberate.

presets.name: Use Touch of the Magi
presets.description: Highlights unused Touch of the Magi windows.

presets.name: Avoid capped Fire Blast charges
reviewReasons: Charge count and recharge can be altered by Fire Mage build interactions and haste.

presets.name: Use Revival / Restoral
presets.description: Highlights unused Revival windows. Restoral is a talent replacement and may need a separate spell ID.

presets.name: Use Thunder Focus Tea
presets.description: Highlights unused Thunder Focus Tea windows.

presets.name: Avoid capping Chi
presets.description: Flags periods at 5+ Chi before spending. Adjust for your build if maximum Chi differs.

presets.name: Avoid capped Storm, Earth, and Fire charges
presets.description: Highlights capped Storm, Earth, and Fire charges.

presets.name: Avoid capped Holy Shock charges
presets.description: Highlights capped Holy Shock charges when a build grants multiple charges.
reviewReasons: The second Holy Shock charge is talent-dependent.

presets.name: Use Guardian of Ancient Kings
presets.description: Highlights unused Guardian of Ancient Kings windows.

presets.name: Maintain Shield of the Righteous
presets.description: Flags time without Shield of the Righteous during physical tanking windows. Verify the logged aura ID in your parser.

presets.name: Use Wake of Ashes
presets.description: Highlights unused Wake of Ashes windows.

presets.name: Avoid capped Blade of Justice charges
presets.description: Highlights capped Blade of Justice charges when talented for multiple charges.
reviewReasons: The second Blade of Justice charge is talent-dependent.

presets.name: Use Power Word: Barrier
presets.description: Highlights unused Power Word: Barrier windows.

presets.name: Maintain Atonement coverage
presets.description: Flags allies missing Atonement. Use only inside healing ramps or a time-window filter.

presets.name: Avoid capped Holy Word: Serenity charges
presets.description: Highlights capped Serenity charges when talents grant more than one.
reviewReasons: The second Serenity charge is talent-dependent and Flash Heal reduces the cooldown.

presets.name: Use Void Eruption
presets.description: Highlights unused Void Eruption windows when talented.

presets.name: Use Dark Ascension
presets.description: Highlights unused Dark Ascension windows when talented.

presets.name: Avoid capped Shadow Word: Death charges
presets.description: Highlights capped Shadow Word: Death charges when a build grants multiple charges.
reviewReasons: The second Shadow Word: Death charge is talent-dependent.

presets.name: Avoid capped Shiv charges
reviewReasons: The second Shiv charge is talent-dependent.

presets.name: Maintain Rupture
presets.description: Flags enemies missing Rupture. Best used on boss or selected priority targets.

presets.name: Use Between the Eyes
presets.description: Highlights unused Between the Eyes windows.

presets.name: Maintain Blade Flurry in AoE
presets.description: Flags missing Blade Flurry. Only use during multi-target windows.

presets.name: Avoid capped Shadow Dance charges
reviewReasons: Shadow Dance recovery is modified by rotational cooldown reduction and charge talents.

presets.name: Use Symbols of Death
presets.description: Highlights unused Symbols of Death windows.

presets.name: Avoid capping Maelstrom
presets.description: Flags periods at 90+ Maelstrom before Earth Shock, Elemental Blast, or Earthquake spending.

presets.name: Spend Tempest promptly
presets.description: Flags time holding a Tempest proc rather than casting the upgraded Lightning Bolt.

presets.name: Spend high Maelstrom Weapon stacks
presets.description: Track Maelstrom Weapon stacks. Configure the aura comparator in the UI to flag 8+ stacks.

presets.name: Use Healing Tide Totem
presets.description: Highlights unused Healing Tide Totem windows.

presets.name: Use Spirit Link Totem
presets.description: Highlights unused Spirit Link Totem windows.

presets.name: Avoid capped Riptide charges
presets.description: Highlights capped Riptide charges when a build grants multiple charges.
reviewReasons: The second Riptide charge is talent-dependent.

presets.name: Avoid capping Soul Shards
presets.description: Flags periods at 4+ Soul Shards before spending.

presets.name: Use Havoc
presets.description: Highlights unused Havoc windows in multi-target combat.

presets.name: Use Warbreaker
presets.description: Highlights unused Warbreaker windows when talented.

presets.name: Avoid capped Shield Block charges
reviewReasons: The displayed base spell has one charge; verify the Protection passive/talent-adjusted maximum used by the analyzer.

presets.name: Maintain Ignore Pain coverage
presets.description: Flags time without Ignore Pain during dangerous tanking windows.
